summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 61 • Sleep 53 • Strain 42%

Read
The snack opens the day’s intake only slightly: energy is still well behind the day, and protein has barely entered the picture. With recovery middling, sleep compressed, and output lighter than usual, this favors a measured catch-up over intensity, with muscle protection still underfed.

Quietly catching up.

Performance: Quietly catching up.
